mapper.select: SELECT id, community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_community WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, community_name, community_code, province, city, district, address, contact_person, contact_phone, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_community WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
